name: Josie Faith
tagline: Songs written close to the bone.
bio: I'm Josie Faith — a self-recording singer-songwriter based in Brooklyn. I write lyrics first: the songs start as things I need to say, and the music grows around them.

My first album, Raw, is exactly what it sounds like — every part of it written, played, and recorded by me while I was still learning how. Since then I've wandered through pop, folk, country, and lately a little jazz, and I'm slowly getting better tools and better ears.
If you found this page from an open mic somewhere in Brooklyn: hi, thanks for coming to listen.
